name: Next Dynamics Inc.
summary: Next Dynamics Inc. designs and manufactures military technology solutions for the military and civilian markets in Canada and internationally. It offers advanced small arms projectiles; weapons, including sniper rifles; and towed howitzer modernization retrofits. The company was formerly known as SW Innovative Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Next Dynamics Inc. in September 2020. Next Dynamics Inc. is based in Westmount, Canada.
